name: XiNing Special Steel Co., Ltd.
summary: Xining Special Steel Co., Ltd. engages in the steel manufacturing, iron ore, coking coal, and real estate development businesses in China and internationally. The company provides bearing, tool and die, stainless, and spring steel products. It also engages in the manufacturing coking coal products; real estate development activities; and mining of iron and vanadium ores. The company's products are used in various industries, such as automotive, railway, shipbuilding, petrochemical, mining machinery, weapons and equipment, and aerospace industries. Xining Special Steel Co., Ltd. is based in Xining, China.
